title: Analytics Optimized Data Store
description: Data stores offer reliable and flexible storage for processed data and make it available for queries and analysis on a large scale.

definitions.definition: Data stores offer reliable and flexible storage for processed data and make it available for queries and analysis on a large scale. Data stores do not require data schemas to be defined.
definitions.sources:
- [AWS Mini User Guide to Data Stores and Datasets](https://d1.awsstatic.com/IoT/User%20Guide%20PDFs/03_AWS_Mini-User_Guide_Datastores-and-Datasets_August2018.pdf)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
